Testing:

I've tested these changes manually in a jail against today's ports tree. Could not find any issues whatsoever. All seems to be all fine as far as I know and nothing is broken from previous.


Motivation:

This update is requested specifically for UK atlas, which is now the recommended EPG data provider since RadioTimes no longer include infos for new channels. Which isn't in current version.

Note:
I'm adding riggs because he did the last update and might be interested.
